name_en: Midnight Black Suede🤩 Double Flap 2.55 Classic New Style, Mimi🚩🚩🚩OHANEL New CF Hidden Style🙈 Was I really captivated at first glance? I just 🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and timeless 💖 What's special is that usually shoulder straps are cowhide with chains, this black leather strap is more high-end and retro, a trendy item! Size: 25cm! Small 20cm
